MaxLineLength:TagSelector.kt$TagSelectorMode.MULTI -> onSelectionChange(if (isSelected) selectedItems.toMutableList().apply { remove(item.name) } else selectedItems + item.name)

MaxLineLength:TagSelector.kt$border = if (isSelected) BorderStroke(2.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.4f)) else BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half))
MaxLineLength:TagSelector.kt$color = if (isSelected) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.subtle) else DialogDefaults.containerColor
MaxLineLength:TagSelector.kt$colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, disabledContainerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.4f))
MaxLineLength:TagSelector.kt$focusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
MaxLineLength:TagSelector.kt$onAddConfirm = { name, color, icon -> callbacks.onAddItem(name, color, icon); internalShowAddDialog = false; callbacks.onAddDialogDismiss() }
